title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Quad2 ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Quad2 ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

csailt9m-34.43.en: Client's age is less than 9 months

nmpsdwa-53.130.en: No meningococcal primary series dose was administered

ompsdwa-54.130.en: One meningococcal primary series dose was administered

tmpsdwa-56.130.en: Two meningococcal primary series doses were administered

csaimtoet9m-46.43.en: Client's age is more than or equal to 9 months

csawltoet23mwtpsws-84.118.en: Client's age was less than or equal to 23 months when the primary series was started

tlmdwalt3ma-69.112.en: The latest meningococcal dose was administered less than 3 months ago

tlmdwamt3ma-69.112.en: The latest meningococcal dose was administered more than 3 months ago

csawmt23mwtpsws-72.118.en: Client's age was more than 23 months when the primary series was started

cindfmv-47.52.en: Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination

cidfmv-43.48.en: Client is due for meningococcal vaccination
